title: What Florida Changed in Your Sociology Textbook
description: A chapter-by-chapter comparison of the original OpenStax Introduction to Sociology 3e with Florida's state-modified version, highlighting every edit, deletion, and relocation.

chapters.title: An Introduction to Sociology
chapters.summary_short: The Florida version of Chapter 1 makes several significant deletions and rewrites that together remove politically sensitive content while preserving the chapter's basic structure. The most consequent

chapters.title: Sociological Research
chapters.summary_short: The Florida version of Chapter 2 makes several substantive changes that collectively suppress critical and feminist perspectives in sociological research. Most significantly, the entire "Critical Soci

chapters.title: Culture / Society and Social Interaction
chapters.summary_short: The Florida version merges original Chapters 3 (Culture) and 4 (Society and Social Interaction) into a single chapter. The merger is accompanied by substantial condensation: many illustrative sidebars

chapters.title: Society and Social Interaction
chapters.summary_short: This chapter was merged into Florida Chapter 3: Culture and Society. See Chapter 3 for a detailed comparison of what content was retained, modified, or removed from the merger of Chapters 3 and 4.
